title: Guided human experience
summary: Forge Method now ships a guided human experience increment with stronger first-run facilitation, intent routing, pace/style contracts, and installed-plugin stress coverage.
highlights: Broad first-run ideas now start with brain dump, remaining context, anti-goals, and fast-path versus coaching-path choice before artifacts narrow the product.
Guidance Engine now exposes observable pace contracts for coaching, fast-path, diagnostic, divergent, evidence-first, repair, and mechanical modes.

No-state routing now sends confused users to problem-solving, explicit brainstorms to divergent facilitation, research requests to evidence-first scans, and frustrated guidance feedback to correct-course.
Guidance stress coverage now exercises broad game ideas, rushed/simple requests, lost users, brainstorm, research, drift, and frustrated/cold guidance against source and installed-plugin behavior.
Focused verification loops are documented for short development checks while full unit, runtime smoke, install smoke, and installed guidance stress remain the broader runtime proof.
